reason: Observed Vercel deployment statuses were blocked, so the safest non-destructive repair route is to prepare an alternate provider bridge while preserving Vercel repair as a secondary option.

providers.detail: Repository status reported blocked Vercel deployments.
Alternate bridge provider selected for preparation.

steps: Create or repair a Netlify project linked to hvitiswift-afk/nextjs-boilerplate.
Use the production main branch and exact target commit db5e5cccab42f0503a5ca87f8de38d2ea02188c3.
Configure the supported Next.js runtime and provider-managed environment values.
Deploy without placing secrets in source control.
Record provider deployment ID, commit SHA, verified URL, and verification timestamp only after successful checks.
